meaning: /n.圣体合质耰ty//n.[神学]同蘬/adj.同质的,同疼,圣体共存说,三五,同质
examples: The ultimate essence of the consubstantial trend to the modern communication design is the fulsome functionalism, rationalism.
The research shows that a cultural function is consubstantial with education on the purpose. The basic function of education is its cultural function.
